en: lalaw, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
lalaw, are you home?

ab: lalaw ’okik ray taew’an o! yako hewen, So’o hayza’ kano’ ka howaw? siya So: lobih ila ya:o tapayaka:i’ ila hi lalaw.
ch: B:lalaw不在家耶!我是hewen，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告lalaw。
en: lalaw is not at home. I am hewen. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: koko’, yami hi ’away ki lalaw, hawaeh ka ’a’eleb ’iniya’om!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是'away 和 lalaw，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are ’away as and lalaw, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: yako ’ataw, yako mowa:i’ komi:im hi baSi’.
en: I am ’ataw, I am here for baSi.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: So’o honaehnge: ila ’okay wa:i’, ya:o maSriyae’ ’iSo’on a tomal.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: lalaw, yako mowa:i’ ila makakSiyae’ ki So’o.
en: lalaw, I am here to play with you.
Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: hini ma’an pinamowa’ ka ’aewpir, Santalam naehan.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: wa’ila! hini ma’an pinamowa’ ka boway, Santalam.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Sa:eng! hini ma’an pinamowa’ ka baesaeh Santalam naehan!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: yako ’aewhay somi’ael ka ’iyok, ya:o somi’ael ka linko kayzaeh ila.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.
Let me peel the fruit for you.
Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: pak’akoy si’ael, ma’an tinalek ka tatimae’ ’akoy o.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: wa! sa’oewaz kayzaeh kasazeken, ma’ kayzaeh kasi’aelen.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: yako Sanbaba:ok a tomal, kayni’ somi’ael ila.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
